hooks.command: python3 -c "import os; k=os.environ.get('BROWSER_USE_API_KEY',''); print('SEO Pipeline: BROWSER_USE_API_KEY ' + ('set (' + k[:8] + '...' + k[-4:] + ')' if k else 'MISSING — run: python scripts/setup.py'))"
hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import os; k=os.environ.get('BROWSER_USE_API_KEY',''); print('SEO Pipeline: BROWSER_USE_API_KEY ' + ('set' if k else 'MISSING — run: python scripts/setup.py'))"

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os; k=os.environ.get('BROWSER_USE_API_KEY',''); print('Pipeline key: ' + ('present' if k else 'MISSING'))"
hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import os; k=os.environ.get('BROWSER_USE_API_KEY',''); print('Pipeline key: ' + ('present' if k else 'MISSING'))"
